package rulefixtures

// scenario for go_perf_layer_async_concurrency_goroutine_per_item_without_worker_limit: Layer: Async and concurrency. Flag unbounded goroutine-per-item fanout without a semaphore or worker pool.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: performance; severity: contextual.
type Rule506NegativeRecord struct {
	ID int
	Name string
	Values []string
}

func scenario506Negative(records []Rule506NegativeRecord) int {
	total := 0
	for _, record := range records {
		total += record.ID + len(record.Values)
	}
	return total
}
